TextRun.Text: 14. The purpose/goal of a test is
what you have learned about a subject.

RichText.Text: 1. have trouble/difficulty (in) doing ... 2. it is fun doing sth. 3. enjoy local dishes 4. be addicted to the Chinese landscape 5. a popular social media platform 6. be attracted to the diversity of China's tourism resources 7. become extremely interested in... 8. see how interested they were in Chinese tea 9. keep the popularity of the "China Travel" 10. an increasingly popular phrase 11. be crowded with visitors 12. show the treasured notebook 13. develop a positive attitude to tests 14. The purpose/goal of a test is to show what you have learned about a subject.

TextRun.Text: 5. 一个受欢迎的社交媒体
14. 考试的目的是展示你关于某个

RichText.Text: 1. 做某事有困难 2. 做某事很有趣 3. 品尝当地菜肴 4. 沉迷于中国山水风光 5. 一个受欢迎的社交媒体平台 6. 被中国的旅游资源的多样性 所吸引 7. 对……变得极其感兴趣 8. 看到他们对中国茶有多么感兴趣 9. 保持“中国旅游”的热度/欢迎度 10. 一个越来越流行的短语 11. 挤满了游客 12. 展示珍贵的笔记本 13. 培养对考试的积极态度 14. 考试的目的是展示你关于某个 学科所学到的知识
